lines.label: evidence

options.text: The Tree Budget record says Cheerio tree-construction evidence adapter looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Tree Budget.

For separate evidence from confidence, fetch one convenient page, omit owner authorization, source and emitted revision, URL and robots policy, runtime admission, stream and Promise ownership, Cheerio and browser differences, accessibility states, changed fixtures, recovery, and controlled Node transfer, then accept plausible objects as TypeScript crawler proof. This does not satisfy Tree Budget for Cheerio tree-construction evidence adapter.
The record names the assumption, applies Tree Budget, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
